description1.language: Located in Los Angeles's Koreatown, H Hotel offers complimentary WiFi and a 24-hour front desk. The hotel is within a 5-minute drive of the Los Angeles Convention Center and Crypto.com Arena. Select rooms offer mountain or city views and include a flat-screen TV with cable channels, an iPod docking station, and a private bathroom. Bathrooms feature complimentary toiletries. H Cafe, the Number 1 Breakfast and Brunch Restaurant in Korea Town, is attached to the lobby and offers local cuisine breakfasts daily. Onsite self-parking is available for a surcharge. The hotel provides daily housekeeping, luggage storage, and express check-in/check-out. Smoking is prohibited throughout the property. L.A. Live is 2.4 miles away, and the nearest airport, Los Angeles International Airport, is 18.7 miles away.

description2.language: The H by H Hospitality is a hotel.

description1.language: Located in Hollywood Hills, Los Angeles, this bed and breakfast is within a 5-minute drive of Universal Studios Hollywood and the Hollywood Bowl. It offers air-conditioned rooms with flat-screen televisions and private bathrooms featuring shower/tub combinations, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Rooms also include desks, complimentary newspapers, and phones with free local calls. Guests can enjoy a complimentary English breakfast served daily from 7:00 AM to 9:00 AM. Amenities include a garden, a fireplace in the lobby, barbecue grills, complimentary wired internet access, a computer station, and express check-out.

description1.language: The Wayfarer DTLA, a Tapestry Collection by Hilton, is a 12-story hotel in Downtown Los Angeles, offering 135 air-conditioned guest rooms with flat-screen TVs, rainfall showerheads, and complimentary toiletries. Located minutes from the Convention Center, Staples Center (Crypto.com Arena), L.A. Live, and Microsoft Theater, the hotel features multiple dining options including two restaurants, a coffee shop/cafe, and a bar/lounge. Amenities include complimentary Wi-Fi, concierge services, a 24-hour front desk, express check-out, and a safe deposit box. Full breakfast is available daily for a fee. Nearby attractions include The Bloc, Grammy Museum, Peacock Theater, Orpheum Theatre, Pershing Square, Good Samaritan Hospital, The Belasco Theater, Santee Alley, The Broad, Walt Disney Concert Hall, and Grand Central Market. The nearest airport is Los Angeles International Airport (LAX).

Eco-friendly toiletries, cleaning supplies, and energy-saving switches are provided, along with a recycling bin. Housekeeping is available on request.

description1.language: The E-Central Downtown Los Angeles Hotel offers 178 air-conditioned guest rooms with minibars, LCD televisions, pillowtop beds with down comforters, and en-suite bathrooms featuring bathtubs, designer toiletries, and hair dryers. Each room includes a 65-inch flat-screen cable TV, a Keurig single-cup coffee machine, and complimentary Wi-Fi. The hotel features 2 on-site restaurants, Nixo Patio Lounge (serving breakfast and dinner), and a bar/lounge. Cooked-to-order breakfasts are available daily (7:00 AM to 10:00 AM, fee applies). Amenities include complimentary Wi-Fi in all areas, a 24-hour front desk, multilingual staff, dry cleaning/laundry services, a vending machine, a banquet hall, meeting rooms, and event space (10640 sq ft/988 sq m). On-site parking is available. The hotel is centrally located, steps from L.A. Live and the Grammy Museum, and close to Crypto.com Arena, Peacock Theater, and the Los Angeles Convention Center. Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) is approximately 27 km away.

Hypoallergenic bedding, a down duvet, and pillowtop bed are provided. Air conditioning and daily housekeeping are included. LED light bulbs are used. Cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available. Toothbrush and toothpaste are not provided.

description1.language:
Location
The family-friendly city hotel is ideally located in the heart of Monterey Park, close to Downtown Los Angeles and all its popular attractions. This Monterey Park hotel is minutes from Dodger Stadium baseball park, Griffith Observatory, the famous Hollywood Walk of Fame (16.1 km away), Disneyland theme park (41.8 km away), the Staples Center multipurpose sports arena and Universal Studios Hollywood amusement park (22.5 km away). Other nearby places of interest include Los Angeles Zoo (11.3 km away), Rodeo Drive (24.1 km away), Los Angeles Convention Center (10.5 km away), Rose Bowl Stadium (14.5 km) and the Hollywood sign (17.7 km). John Wayne airport is in the immediate vicinity, Bob Hope Airport is around 35 km away and Los Angeles International Airport is approximately 42 km.
Facilities
The hotel features 50 accommodation units. Guests of the hotel are welcomed in the lobby, which has a 24-hour reception and a 24-hour check-out service. The upper floors can be reached by lift. Services and facilities at the hotel include internet access, wireless internet access, a breakfast room, a laundry and a fax machine. Guests arriving in their own vehicles can park in the car park.
Rooms
The hotel offers non-smoking rooms. All rooms feature air conditioning, central heating and a bathroom. In addition, a fridge and a microwave are available. Convenient features include internet access, a telephone, a TV and wireless internet access. Wheelchair-accessible accommodation units are also bookable. A hairdryer can also be found in each of the bathrooms.
Meals
Breakfast is bookable as a board option.
Payment
All major credit cards, including American Express, VISA and MasterCard, are accepted for payment.

description2.language: The Comfort Inn Monterey Park - Los Angeles is a Tourist hotel. Located in City Centre area. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

hotel.hotelName: Comfort Inn Monterey Park - Los Angeles

description1.language: The LINE Hotel in Los Angeles offers a unique blend of Korean, Latino, and American cultures. Located in a mid-century building in Koreatown, it's within four miles of Hollywood, Staples Center, the Los Angeles Convention Center, and the Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum. Beverly Hills and Universal Studios are a short 15-minute drive away. A Metro Purple Line station is across the street. Each air-conditioned room features floor-to-ceiling windows with city views, custom furnishings, modern artwork, a flat-screen TV, an iPod docking station, a minibar with American and Korean snacks and beverages, and an in-room safe. Amenities include free Wi-Fi in public areas, an outdoor pool, a furnished sun terrace, three on-site restaurants (including Openaire with poolside dining and shareable plates), a retail store, a fitness center, bicycle rentals, and complimentary Tai Chi classes on Sundays. Cooked-to-order breakfasts are available daily for a fee. Additional amenities include concierge services, a business center, dry cleaning/laundry services, a 24-hour front desk, room service (limited hours), a poolside bar, wedding services, and a banquet hall. Parking is available. The hotel is smoke-free except in designated areas.

description2.language: The Line Hotel is a Leisure, Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

description1.language: The DoubleTree by Hilton Los Angeles - Westside offers upscale accommodations in Culver City, conveniently located near the 405 freeway and three miles from LAX. Enjoy easy access to beaches (Venice and Malibu), downtown Los Angeles, Hollywood, and Beverly Hills. Guest rooms and suites feature comfortable workspaces, Sweet Dreams® beds, and Wi-Fi. Amenities include a heated outdoor pool, a fitness center, and on-site dining at West &amp; Co restaurant, offering breakfast, lunch, and dinner, as well as a bar/lounge. The hotel also provides 21,561 square feet of event space and a 24-hour front desk with multilingual staff. Refrigerators, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers are included in each guest room. Nearby attractions include Loyola Marymount University (2.4 km), Sony Pictures Studios (5.3 km), and various beaches and entertainment venues (distances vary). Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) is 5.5 km away.

description1.language: Located in Gardena, Patio Motel offers air-conditioned rooms with complimentary Wi-Fi, flat-screen televisions with cable programming, and bathrooms with bathtubs or showers and complimentary toiletries. Microwaves and refrigerators are available on request. Guests can enjoy convenient amenities such as a 24-hour reception, complimentary parking, luggage storage, a bar/lounge, and vending machines. Wi-Fi is available in communal areas. Daily housekeeping is provided. Smoking is prohibited throughout the motel except in designated areas. The motel is within a 10-minute drive of SoFi Stadium and Kia Forum, and close to attractions such as Hustler Casino and Porsche Experience Center. The nearest airport is Hawthorne Municipal Airport, 5.4 km away.

description2.language: The Patio Motel is a hotel.

description1.language: Freehand Los Angeles, a Beaux Arts hotel in Downtown Los Angeles, offers 226 designer rooms with seating areas, en-suite bathrooms, pillowtop beds with Egyptian cotton sheets, and TVs (in select rooms). Enjoy spectacular city views from the rooftop pool and bar, along with three restaurants (including The Exchange, serving Israeli cuisine), a coffee shop/cafe, and two bars/lounges. Amenities include complimentary Wi-Fi, a 24-hour fitness center, a 24-hour front desk, concierge services, express check-out, dry cleaning/laundry services, and on-site parking. The hotel is conveniently located near many attractions, including the Grammy Museum (900m), L.A. Live (1.2km), Crypto.com Arena (1.2km), and the Los Angeles Convention Center (1.5km). Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) is 28.6km away. Select rooms feature rainfall showerheads and designer toiletries. Shared rooms with bunk beds are also available.

description1.language: Located in the heart of Hollywood near Sunset Blvd, The Moment Hotel offers a modern and chic experience with a minimalist Hollywood vibe. Guest rooms are air-conditioned and feature complimentary WiFi, flat-screen TVs, Keurig coffee makers, and private bathrooms with rainfall showerheads and designer toiletries. Hotel amenities include a 24-hour front desk, concierge services, and a Roofdeck Lounge serving craft beers, signature cocktails, and gourmet plates. Room service is also available during limited hours. The hotel is located close to the Sunset Strip and the Hollywood Walk of Fame.

description1.language:
The hotel is located in Los Angeles, 12.5 km from Santa Monica Beach, 1.5 km from Beverly Hills Gardens Park, 16 km from the Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County, and 19 km from California Science Center. The Los Angeles International Airport is 22 km away from the property.

Facilities and services include a restaurant, bar, Wi-Fi, business services, spa facilities, 24-hour front desk, concierge facilities, ATM/cash, currency exchange, elevator, car parking(extra charge), laundry(extra charge), dry cleaning(extra charge), ironing facilities(extra charge), fitness center, massage(extra charge), and a pool.

Rooms feature air conditioning, flat-screen TV, minibar, Wi-Fi, desk, telephone, safe, a private bathroom, and a balcony.

Address: 300 SOUTH DOHENY DRIVE, LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA 90048 U.S.A.

description1.language: The Sheraton Gateway Los Angeles Hotel offers 803 guest rooms with 49-inch smart TVs featuring cable programming, pillowtop beds, and bathrooms with showers and hair dryers. Amenities include a health club, an outdoor pool, complimentary Wi-Fi, gift shops/newsstands, and wedding services. Dining options include the poolside Brasserie restaurant with a bar/lounge, alfresco dining, and pool views, as well as a coffee shop/cafe. A buffet breakfast is available daily from 6:00 AM to 10:00 AM for a fee. The hotel also features a 24-hour business center, express check-in/check-out, a conference center, and 34 meeting rooms totaling 56,834 square feet (5,280 square meters) of event space. A complimentary 24-hour airport shuttle to and from Los Angeles International Airport (LAX), located 1.1 miles away, is provided. Nearby attractions include Loyola Marymount University (2.9 mi), Toyota Sports Performance Center (2.9 mi), and SoFi Stadium (3.9 mi).

description2.language: The Sheraton Gateway Los Angeles Hotel is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

description1.language: Step aboard The Queen Mary, a historic Art Deco ocean liner transformed into a hotel, permanently docked in Long Beach. Explore this legendary vessel, once host to royalty and celebrities, and later a vital troopship during World War II. The hotel offers 200 air-conditioned rooms with flat-screen TVs, pillowtop beds, and bathrooms featuring shower/tub combinations and hair dryers. Dining options include Sir Winston's award-winning restaurant and Chelsea Chowder House &amp; Bar, along with a coffee shop/cafe. Enjoy two bars/lounges, a 24-hour fitness center, karaoke, and shopping. The hotel provides concierge services, gift shops/newsstands, wedding services, a computer station, express check-out, and dry cleaning/laundry services. Event space includes 45,000 square feet of conference space and 15 meeting rooms. Self-parking is available (fees apply). Guests can enjoy nostalgic tours, and spectacular ocean and skyline vistas. Cooked-to-order breakfasts are available daily (fee applies). The hotel is steps from RMS Queen Mary and a 5-minute walk from the Long Beach Cruise Terminal. Nearby attractions include the Aquarium of the Pacific and The Pike Outlets (approximately 1.5 miles away). Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) is the preferred airport.

description2.language: The Queen Mary is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

Guests can enjoy terrace views and take advantage of amenities such as a 24-hour front desk, multilingual staff, luggage storage, and concierge services. A vending machine and a communal TV area are also available. Self-parking is offered for a fee.

description1.language: Homewood Suites by Hilton Los Angeles International Airport offers comfortable suites with separate living and sleeping areas, full kitchens including a full-sized refrigerator/freezer and stovetop, and complimentary WiFi. A complimentary airport shuttle is available 24 hours. Guests can enjoy a complimentary breakfast. The hotel features an outdoor pool. Dining options include Waypoint Kitchen, the hotel's restaurant, and a bar/lounge. Additional amenities include a 24-hour Suite Shop, complimentary newspapers in the lobby, and dry cleaning/laundry services. The hotel is located near Los Angeles International Airport (LAX).

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles (Hollywood), Samesun Hollywood - Hostel is steps from Hollywood Boulevard and Hollywood Walk of Fame. It offers convenient amenities such as complimentary wireless internet access and concierge services. Guests can purchase items at the on-site grocery/convenience store. The hostel features a 24-hour front desk, luggage storage, and laundry facilities. Guests can prepare meals in the shared/communal kitchen. The individually decorated guestrooms include refrigerators, microwaves, and bathrooms with showers, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Nearby attractions include Hollywood and Highland Center, Hollywood Wax Museum, and TCL Chinese Theatre. The nearest airports are Hollywood Burbank Airport (BUR), Los Angeles Intl. (LAX), Van Nuys, CA (VNY), and Hawthorne, CA (HHR-Hawthorne Municipal).

Amenities include complimentary Wi-Fi, airport transportation, and parking. Guest rooms are equipped with flat-screen TVs and private balconies or patios. Additional conveniences include a 24-hour front desk and luggage storage.

description1.language: Located near Los Angeles International Airport (LAX), Renaissance Los Angeles Airport Hotel offers 502 guestrooms with pillowtop beds, down comforters, and premium bedding. Rooms feature LCD televisions, and private bathrooms with shower/tub combinations, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Wireless internet access is available (surcharge). The hotel features an outdoor pool, a 24-hour fitness center, and two restaurants, including Studio 12 Bar &amp; Lounge serving American cuisine. Guests can enjoy drinks at the bar/lounge. Buffet breakfasts are available daily from 6:00 AM to 11:00 AM for a fee. Amenities include a business center, limo/town car service, express check-out, gift shops/newsstands, and wedding services. The hotel offers 6273 square feet (583 square meters) of event space, including a conference center and 17 meeting rooms. A complimentary roundtrip airport shuttle is available 24 hours. Nearby attractions include Toyota Sports Performance Center, Loyola Marymount University, Hollywood Park Casino, Kia Forum, and SoFi Stadium.

roomType.roomDescription: This 384-square-foot non-smoking room features WiFi, a 27-inch LCD TV with premium channels, and a private bathroom with a shower/tub combination, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. For dining convenience, there's a mini-fridge, coffee/tea maker, and room service (limited hours). Sleep comfortably on a pillowtop bed with premium bedding and a down duvet. A double sofa bed and a laptop-compatible safe are included. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Enjoy climate-controlled heating and air conditioning, daily housekeeping (on request), free local calls, a magnifying mirror, energy-saving switches, a recycling bin, and LED light bulbs. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability.

roomType.name: CLUB, KING BED, ACCESSIBLE

roomAmenities.amenity: AIR CONDITIONING INDIVIDUALLY CONTROLLED IN ROOM

roomType.roomDescription: This non-smoking, 324-square-foot room offers Club Level access with buffet breakfast and light refreshments. It features a pillowtop bed with premium bedding and a down duvet. Guests can enjoy WiFi, a 27-inch LCD TV with premium channels, a mini-fridge, a coffee/tea maker, and limited-hours room service. The private bathroom includes a shower/tub combination, free toiletries, and a hair dryer. A laptop-compatible safe, iron/ironing board, and laptop workspace are provided. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Comfort is ensured with climate-controlled heating and air conditioning, and daily housekeeping (housekeeping on request). Eco-friendly amenities include energy-saving switches, a recycling bin, and LED light bulbs. Accessibility features include a phone accessibility kit, closed-captioned TV, braille signage, a visual fire alarm, a vibrating pillow alarm, lever door handles, thin carpet and tile flooring. Some rooms include accessibility features such as a roll-in shower (58-inch width), wheelchair accessibility, a toilet grab bar (35-inch height), a grab bar near the toilet, a wheelchair-width doorway (34-inch width), a low-height door lock, and a low-height view port in the door. Other rooms include an accessible bathtub, a bathtub grab bar (34-inch height), a grab bar in the bathtub, and a transfer shower. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability.

description1.language: The SureStay Hotel by Best Western Beverly Hills West LA offers affordable accommodation in a central Los Angeles location, across from CBS Studios and within walking distance of The Grove and Farmer's Market. Guests can enjoy a complimentary on-the-go breakfast served daily from 7:00 AM to 10:00 AM and complimentary wireless internet access. All non-smoking rooms feature a microwave, refrigerator, coffee maker, and flat-screen television. The hotel provides a 24-hour front desk, multilingual staff, complimentary newspapers in the lobby, tour/ticket assistance, a vending machine, and free self-parking. Popular attractions like Hollywood Walk of Fame and Rodeo Drive are within a short drive. Please note that the parking area is closed seasonally from October 25 to October 31, and the public bath is closed Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Sunday.

description1.language: AC Hotel by Marriott Beverly Hills, located in Los Angeles near Wilshire Boulevard, offers an outdoor pool and a fitness center. Guests can enjoy complimentary Wi-Fi, on-site dining at the restaurant, and a bar/lounge. A buffet breakfast is available for a fee on weekdays from 6:30 AM to 10:00 AM and on weekends from 7:00 AM to 11:00 AM. The hotel features event spaces, including conference space and meeting rooms. The 176 guestrooms include a refrigerator, MP3 docking station, and a 55-inch flat-screen TV with cable. Private bathrooms offer complimentary toiletries and hair dryers. Safes and desks are provided. The hotel also offers a 24-hour front desk, a business center, dry cleaning/laundry services, and an ATM. Petersen Automotive Museum and the Los Angeles County Museum of Art are nearby. Los Angeles International Airport is the preferred airport.

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles' Koreatown, Hotel Normandie is a boutique hotel near the Wilshire/Normandie metro station and local attractions. The hotel offers complimentary Wi-Fi, concierge services, a 24-hour front desk, and a 24-hour business center. Guests can enjoy on-site dining at two restaurants and a coffee shop/cafe, as well as a bar/lounge and a complimentary daily reception. Cooked-to-order breakfasts are available for a fee. The hotel also features a fitness center and meeting/event rooms. All 92 guestrooms include air conditioning, refrigerators, flat-screen televisions with satellite programming, pillowtop beds with premium bedding, and private bathrooms with deep soaking bathtubs and rainfall showerheads. Dry cleaning/laundry services and daily housekeeping are available. On-site parking is available. Smoking is prohibited throughout the hotel.

description1.language: Le Bon Hotel Hollywood is centrally located in Los Angeles, steps from the Hollywood Walk of Fame and a 5-minute walk from Pantages Theatre. This non-smoking hotel offers air-conditioned rooms with complimentary Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs with satellite channels. Rooms are decorated in a red, black, and white Hollywood glamour theme and feature pillowtop beds with Frette Italian sheets and private bathrooms with showers and complimentary toiletries. Guests can enjoy a coffee shop/cafe, room service, and complimentary donuts. Amenities include a 24-hour front desk, an elevator, and a microwave in a common area. The Hollywood/Vine Station Metro is a 2-minute walk away, providing easy access to the greater Los Angeles area. Nearby attractions include the Hollywood Palladium, Capitol Records building and the Sunset Strip.

description1.language:
Rodeway Inn near Melrose Ave is located within one kilometer of Grauman's Chinese Theatre, Kodak Theatre, Hollywood Wax Museum, Pantages Theatre and the famous Hollywood Walk of Fame on Hollywood Boulevard. CBS Television City, Universal Studios Hollywood, the Hollywood Bowl, Beverly Hills, Rodeo Drive, the Los Angeles Zoo and The Greek Theatre are all within five miles of this Hollywood, CA hotel.

Additional local points of interest include Downtown Los Angeles, Dorothy Chandler Pavilion, Exposition Park, Los Angeles Convention Center and Staples Center.

Rodeway Inn near Melrose Ave hotel is 16.1 km from the Rose Bowl Stadium, Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum, University of Southern California, the University of California, Los Angeles and the Museum District. If you are looking for adventure, the hotel is only 64.4 km from Disneyland, Knott's Berry Farm, Knots's Soak City Orange County and Six Flags Magic Mountain.

If you are looking for shopping, the hotel is two miles the Hollywood and Highland Center, or take the Red Line to the LA Fashion District, or experience The Grove. Enjoy many restaurants in and around the Hollywood area. The Los Angeles International Airport is 32.2 km and the Bob Hope Airport in Burbank is only 17.7 km from the hotel.

Guests of this Hollywood, CA hotel are invited to enjoy full-service amenities, including free wireless high-speed Internet access, free coffee, and guest laundry facilities.

All spacious guest rooms have microwaves and refrigerators. In addition to standard amenities, some rooms have coffee makers. Business travelers will also appreciate access to a fax machine. Competitive corporate rates are available.

description2.language: The Rodeway Inn near Melrose Ave is a hotel.

Rodeway Inn Convention Center features free high-speed internet access. Guests will also appreciate in-room coffeemakers, microwaves and refrigerators. description1.language: Located near Los Angeles International Airport, the hotel offers air-conditioned rooms with complimentary Wi-Fi and cable programming. Rooms include refrigerators, safes, and separate sitting areas. Housekeeping is provided daily. The hotel features a 24-hour front desk, multilingual staff, and designated smoking areas. On-site parking is available (charges may apply). Guests can enjoy room service during limited hours, a restaurant and bar, and an outdoor pool. The hotel offers wheelchair-accessible accommodation units and adapted facilities.

description1.language: Best Western Royal Palace Inn &amp; Suites offers convenient access to major Los Angeles attractions, including UCLA, Beverly Hills, Santa Monica Pier, Venice Beach, Fox Studios, Sony Studios, and the Los Angeles Convention Center via the nearby Metro Expo Line. Guest rooms feature refrigerators, microwaves, coffeemakers, LCD televisions with cable, and free Wi-Fi. A complimentary full breakfast is served daily. Hotel amenities include an outdoor pool, a fitness center, a 24-hour business center, and valet parking. Conference space is available. The hotel is approximately 19 km from LAX.

description1.language: Located near the University of Southern California and Exposition Park, USC Hotel offers air-conditioned rooms with complimentary wireless internet access and cable TV. Each room includes a private bathroom with complimentary toiletries and a hairdryer, as well as a coffee/tea maker. The hotel features an outdoor pool, a fitness center, a ballroom, and concierge services. Dining options include two restaurants, one of which is Mc Kay's, a bar/lounge, and room service (during limited hours). A buffet breakfast is available on weekdays from 6:30 AM to 10:30 AM and on weekends from 6:30 AM to 11:00 AM for a fee. Additional amenities include a business center, express check-out, dry cleaning/laundry services, and vending machines. Self-parking is available onsite (subject to charges).

description1.language: Located in Woodland Hills, Home2 Suites By Hilton Woodland Hills Los Angeles offers pet-friendly accommodation within 30 minutes of Universal Studios Hollywood and Topanga State Park. It features an indoor pool, a 24-hour fitness center with a Peloton® Bike, a restaurant, a bar/lounge, and a communal living room. Guests can enjoy a complimentary buffet breakfast and free WiFi. The hotel offers 170 guestrooms with air conditioning, LED televisions, pillowtop beds with down comforters, double sofa beds, and private bathrooms with designer toiletries and hair dryers. Select rooms include a balcony. A business center, express check-in, and express check-out are available. Private parking and valet parking are available exclusively. Nearby attractions include Westfield Topanga, Candy Cane Lane, and Pierce College.

roomType.roomDescription: This 358-square-foot, non-smoking studio features a king-size bed, a separate seating area, and climate-controlled air conditioning and heating. Entertainment options include an LED TV with cable channels and pay movies, plus WiFi (50+ Mbps). The well-fitted kitchenette provides a stovetop, refrigerator, dishwasher, kitchenware, and coffee/tea maker. The private bathroom offers a bathtub or shower, a shower/tub combination, and designer toiletries, with some rooms featuring a rainfall showerhead. A hairdryer and free toiletries are also provided. Additional amenities include a washing machine, a double sofa bed, hypo-allergenic bedding, a down duvet, daily housekeeping, weekly housekeeping, free local calls, and an iron/ironing board. Accessible rooms are available and may include features such as low-height door lock, grab bars in the shower/bathtub, low-height view port in door, low-height desk, wheelchair-width doorways, hand-held showerhead, accessible bathtub, wheelchair-accessible bathroom vanity, bathroom emergency pull cord, wheelchair accessibility, visual fire alarm, portable bathtub seat, phone accessibility kit, closed-captioned TV, and low-height bed. Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability.

description1.language: Located in Los Angeles (Hollywood Hills), Hollywood Hills Hotel is within a 5-minute drive of Hollywood Walk of Fame and Hollywood Bowl. The hotel offers complimentary wireless internet access, a garden, and a living plant wall. Guests can enjoy Japanese cuisine at YAMASHIRO restaurant, which features a bar/lounge and garden views, or dine at the coffee shop/cafe. Featured amenities include express check-in, express check-out, and laundry facilities. Self-parking is available onsite (subject to charges). The hotel has air-conditioned rooms, each with a kitchen, pillowtop bed with premium bedding, and a private balcony or patio. A 50-inch flat-screen television with digital programming is provided. An outdoor pool is available. The swimming pool will be unavailable from May 2, 2025, to July 31, 2025 (dates subject to change).

description2.language: The Hollywood Hills Hotel is a hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles

description1.language: Located in Century City, Los Angeles, the Fairmont Century Plaza hotel has been reimagined following a renovation. It features 400 guest rooms with private furnished balconies, and 63 luxury residences. Guests can enjoy French cuisine at Lumière Brasserie, relax at the Fairmont Spa Century Plaza with massages and body treatments, and take advantage of amenities such as an outdoor pool, a sauna, and a fitness center. Complimentary wireless internet access is available throughout the property. The hotel also offers a business center, limo/town car service, and express check-out. Event spaces are available, including conference space and meeting rooms. Guest rooms feature pillowtop beds with Egyptian cotton sheets, 65-inch flat-screen televisions with cable programming, minibars, espresso makers, and private bathrooms with designer toiletries. The hotel is near Westfield Century City and a short drive from Rodeo Drive and the University of California, Los Angeles. Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) is the preferred airport.

description2.language: The Fairmont Century Plaza Los Angeles is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

description1.language: Located in Valley Village, Hotel Mariposa Los Angeles offers air-conditioned, non-smoking rooms with free WiFi. Each of the 94 guestrooms features a flat-screen TV, premium bedding, a desk, a safety deposit box, a microwave, and a private bathroom with a shower/tub combination, hair dryer, and bathrobes. Guests can enjoy a to-go breakfast (available for a fee) from Nectar Cafe, snacks from the coffee shop, and drinks at the bar/lounge. The hotel features a fitness center and a hot tub. Additional amenities include a 24-hour front desk, ATM/banking services, luggage storage, and a safe deposit box at the front desk. Self-parking is available (subject to charges). The hotel is near CBS Studio Center, Universal Studios Hollywood, and Warner Brothers Studio.

description1.language: The Belmont Shore Inn is a smoke-free hotel located in the Belmont Shore area of Long Beach. It offers complimentary parking nearby. Guests can enjoy air-conditioned rooms featuring plasma televisions, pillowtop beds with premium bedding, and complimentary wireless internet access. Bathrooms include showers and complimentary toiletries. A grocery/convenience store is available on-site. The hotel is conveniently located near City Beach, California State University, Long Beach, and the Long Beach Convention and Entertainment Center, with easy access to several airports. The 24-hour front desk staff speaks English, Gujarati, and Hindi.

description1.language: The Hollywood Grande, Autograph Collection, is centrally located in Los Angeles, within a 10-minute walk of Hollywood Boulevard and Hollywood Walk of Fame. This hotel offers 190 guestrooms with LED televisions, pillowtop beds with down comforters and premium bedding, and private bathrooms with designer toiletries and hair dryers. Complimentary wireless internet access and digital programming are provided. Guests can enjoy a seasonal outdoor pool, a 24-hour fitness center, concierge services, and a banquet hall. Dining options include the Mes Amis restaurant and two bars/lounges. Continental breakfast is available daily (fee applies). Additional amenities include a 24-hour front desk, luggage storage, and a safe deposit box at the front desk. The preferred airport is Los Angeles Intl. (LAX), 34.6 km / 21.5 mi away.

description1.language: Located in Pasadena's Lamanda Park neighborhood, Pasadena Lodge offers complimentary wireless internet access and free self-parking. The motel features air-conditioned rooms equipped with microwaves and flat-screen televisions. Bathrooms include shower/tub combinations. Housekeeping is provided daily, and irons/ironing boards are available upon request. It is within a short drive of California Institute of Technology and The Huntington Library, Art Museum, and Botanical Gardens.

roomType.roomDescription: This soundproofed, non-smoking room features a queen bed, free WiFi, and a flat-screen TV. description1.language:
Embassy Suites by Hilton Los Angeles International Airport North offers spacious suites, each featuring two televisions, a refrigerator, and a microwave. Select suites include a separate living room and bedroom. Complimentary WiFi is available. A complimentary cooked-to-order breakfast is served (weekday hours: 6:00 AM - 9:00 AM; weekend hours: 7:00 AM - 10:30 AM). A nightly manager's reception with complimentary drinks and snacks is offered (alcohol service subject to local laws). The hotel provides a free 24-hour airport shuttle (every 20 minutes). Located half a mile from LAX, it offers easy access to Downtown Los Angeles, Hollywood, Beverly Hills, Santa Monica, and the South Bay via nearby freeways. Amenities may include a business center, meeting rooms (largest room: 2,574 sq ft), and a fitness center. The pool and breakfast service may have reduced hours or be temporarily unavailable. On-site restaurant, room service, and evening social are currently unavailable. Guestrooms include private balconies, coffee makers, flat-screen cable TVs, and private bathrooms with complimentary toiletries. The hotel is near several attractions including the Kia Forum, SoFi Stadium, and various beaches (distances vary).

Daily Mandatory Charge includes: Los Angeles Tourism Marketing District Assessment and California Tourism Assessment.

description2.language: The Embassy Suites by Hilton Los Angeles International Airport North is a Tourist hotel. Located in Los Angeles International Airport Area. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

roomType.roomDescription: This 500-sq-foot non-smoking quadruple room features a king-size bed, a private balcony, and a separate living room with a double sofa bed. Amenities include free WiFi and wired internet access, a 42-inch LCD TV with premium channels and pay-per-view movies, a video game console, a refrigerator, microwave, coffee/tea maker, and limited-hour room service. The private bathroom offers a bathtub or shower, free toiletries, and a hairdryer. A laptop-compatible safe, iron/ironing board, and wheelchair-accessible bathroom vanity are also provided. Hypoallergenic bedding, blackout drapes/curtains, and fresh bed sheets (on request) ensure comfortable sleep. Daily housekeeping is available upon request. Cribs/infant beds are available on request. Energy-saving switches are installed. Toothbrushes and toothpaste are not provided.

description1.language: Located in downtown Los Angeles' Little Tokyo, the Miyako Hotel Los Angeles offers a blend of Japanese elegance and American convenience. This hotel is centrally located near Walt Disney Concert Hall and Grand Central Market. The hotel features a restaurant with a bar/lounge, a coffee shop and offers room service during limited hours. Guests can enjoy complimentary wireless internet access, concierge services, a fitness center, a banquet hall, and vending machines. Other amenities include a business center, dry cleaning/laundry services, and a 24-hour front desk. The hotel offers guestrooms with cable TV, refrigerators, safes, desks, and private bathrooms with shower/tub combinations, complimentary toiletries and hair dryers. Housekeeping is provided daily. Parking is available for guests with vehicles. Smoking is prohibited within the hotel.

description2.language: The Miyako Hotel Los Angeles is a Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are located in the hotel.

geoLocation.name: LAX- Los Angeles International Airport, Los Angeles
